archetype: 5 (Jewel & Luxury) - Modified for Premium SaaS Dashboard

components.card: bg-[#13151A] rounded-2xl border border-white/5 shadow-[0_8px_32px_-8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#15171E] hover:border-white/10 relative overflow-hidden
components.button_primary: bg-[#4F46E5] text-white rounded-xl px-5 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#6366F1] hover:shadow-[0_0_16px_rgba(79,70,229,0.3)] active:scale-[0.98] flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.button_secondary: bg-white/5 text-white rounded-xl px-5 py-2.5 font-medium border border-white/5 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/10 active:scale-[0.98] flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.input: bg-black/20 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4F46E5]/50 focus:border-[#4F46E5]/50 transition-all
components.dropdown_menu: bg-[#1C1F26] border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-[0_16px_48px_-12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6)] p-1 overflow-hidden backdrop-blur-xl
components.dropdown_item: rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-zinc-300 cursor-pointer transition-colors hover:bg-white/5 hover:text-white flex items-center gap-2 outline-none focus:bg-white/5 focus:text-white
components.table_container: bg-[#13151A] rounded-2xl border border-white/5 overflow-hidden shadow-[0_8px_32px_-8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]
components.table_header: bg-black/20 border-b border-white/5 text-zinc-400 font-medium text-xs uppercase tracking-wider py-4 px-6 text-left
components.sidebar: w-64 bg-[#0A0B0F] border-r border-white/5 h-screen flex flex-col p-4
components.kpi_card: relative overflow-hidden bg-[#13151A] rounded-2xl border border-white/5 p-6 shadow-[0_8px_32px_-8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]
components.badge: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border border-white/10
components.tabs_list: inline-flex h-10 items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-black/20 p-1 text-zinc-400
components.tabs_trigger: inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=active]:bg-white/10 data-[state=active]:text-white data-[state=active]:shadow-sm

images.description: Abstract luxury dark background with smooth gradient for welcome or auth screens

instructions_to_main_agent: Since the project uses `.js` / `.jsx` files, do NOT create or import `.tsx` files. Ensure all created components and pages use `.jsx` syntax.

Do NOT use raw HTML for interactive elements like Select, Dialog, or Dropdown. Import the Shadcn UI components provided in `src/components/ui/` and customize their classes via className or by editing the component files directly to apply the exact styles defined in this guideline (rounded-xl/2xl, soft borders border-white/5).
Update `tailwind.config.js` to extend the fontFamily with `Outfit` (sans) and `Plus Jakarta Sans` (sans), and inject Google Fonts into `index.css`.
For the 'Period selector (Day/Week/Month)', use Shadcn Tabs or ToggleGroup, styled with `rounded-xl` container and `rounded-lg` active pills with `bg-white/10`.

KPI Cards must look 'rich'. Add a subtle colored radial gradient in the background of the card using absolute positioning and `blur-3xl`, for example `bg-emerald-500/10` for positive metrics, to simulate a soft glow without hard borders.
For 'Workload Heatmap', use Recharts. Remove grid lines (`vertical={false} horizontal={false}`), use monotone curve lines, dark tooltips (matching dropdown menu style), and no harsh axis lines.
Tables should have NO vertical dividers. Horizontal dividers must be `border-white/5`. Wrap the table in the `table_container` class to provide rounded corners and soft shadow.
Forms must use `rounded-xl` inputs with dark transparent backgrounds (`bg-black/20`) and no sharp borders.
Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, dropdown items, table rows) for testing.
